name: Robert Vititow

contactInfo.office: 220 W. Quitman St., Suite 102, Emory, TX 75440

bio: Robert Vititow serves as the County Attorney for Rains County, handling criminal prosecutions and providing legal guidance to county government. He is dedicated to serving the residents of Emory and the Lake Fork area.
campaignPromises: Provide effective prosecution of criminal cases
Protect the legal interests of Rains County
Support victims of crime and their families
Maintain fiscal responsibility in the county attorney's office
Collaborate with law enforcement on public safety
